query: SELECT fd.id, fd.projectId, fd.consultantId, fd.designType, fd.designValue, fd.supervisionType, fd.supervisionValue, p.name as project, c.name as consultant FROM financialData fd JOIN projects p ON p.id=fd.projectId JOIN consultants c ON c.id=fd.consultantId ORDER BY fd.projectId, fd.consultantId LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4E8R6wFgxnBhGVF.1a403e654cd7 --database Q366eAYG4Q7iaM8VuAmmFX --execute SELECT fd.id, fd.projectId, fd.consultantId, fd.designType, fd.designValue, fd.supervisionType, fd.supervisionValue, p.name as project, c.name as consultant FROM financialData fd JOIN projects p ON p.id=fd.projectId JOIN consultants c ON c.id=fd.consultantId ORDER BY fd.projectId, fd.consultantId LIMIT 20;
